subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, my Hope, the Ultimate Goal of my desire, my Shield and my Refuge! With all lowliness and contrition I cast myself upon Thy threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ربی و رجائی و غایه املی و حرزی و موئلی انی بکل ذل و انکسار اترامی فی عتبه
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
